Ask any hospital dealing with the consequences if governments over reacted.
The main concern was the collapse of the health service which would cause a feedback loop into levels of mortality.

Semantic collapse in AI refers to the degradation of meaning and diversity in AI-generated content and models when they increasingly train on synthetic data, leading to homogenized, low-quality outputs.

posts.text: The U-Model diagnosis: Startup Failure = ∛(Form x Position x Action). If ANY pillar < 0.618, expect collapse. Example: ∛(0.9 x 0.5 x 0.7) = 0.7. Unstable. Learn more: https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/74XGR
posts.parent_text: A (Action): Even with a great idea & perfect timing, execution is key. Poor leadership, slow iteration, unchecked spending – all Action failures. Remember Quibi's billion-dollar flop? A was definitely < 0.618.

The key insight: hallucinations are not bugs, but artifacts of compression. Like Xerox photocopiers that silently replaced digits in floorplans to save memory, LLMs can introduce subtle distortions. Because the output still looks right, we may not notice what has been lost or changed.
